title: Tokenization startup Tradable plans to bring $1 billion worth of private credit assets to Stellar

title: DTCC begins first tokenized stock and Treasury production trades involving JPMorgan, BlackRock and Goldman
message_html: DTCC begins first tokenized stock and Treasury production trades involving JPMorgan, BlackRock and Goldman ...
snippet: JPMorgan will tokenize part of its Invesco QQQ Trust holdings held at DTCC, while Microsoft, Circle, and SPY shares will also be tokenized.
